title: Here’s What Happened in the War in the Middle East on Tuesday
summary_full: The U.S. was said to have sent Iran a peace plan via Pakistan on a day that the Iranians fired a torrent of missiles across the region.
summary_public: The U.S. was said to have sent Iran a peace plan via Pakistan on a day that the Iranians fired a torrent of missiles across the region.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iranians fired a torrent of missiles across the region.
